creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
I have reached out to the author of libsndfile, erikd, about any plans for a release of a fixed version. While using a napshot of the master branch is possible, it creates complexities that would be eliminated by a release of 1.00.29 or a tag of the master branch prior to a release.

If I get a response, I will update this ticket and, if a tag or release is created, will submit a patch to update the port.
